'''Alabar Double Ax''' was a [[Sikurdian/Legends|Sikurdian]] berserker [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], one of the first quarries to be apprehended by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]]. Their ship was confiscated by Valance, and renamed ''[[Kill Switch]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
